mapper.select: select o.order_id, o.order_no, o.org_id, o.deceased_id, o.customer_name, o.customer_phone, o.package_type, o.amount, o.status, o.pay_time, o.remark, o.create_time, o.update_time, org.org_name, d.name as deceased_name from mem_order o left join mem_organization org on o.org_id = org.org_id left join mem_deceased d on o.deceased_id = d.deceased_id where o.order_id = #{orderId}

select o.order_id, o.order_no, o.org_id, o.deceased_id, o.customer_name, o.customer_phone, o.package_type, o.amount, o.status, o.pay_time, o.remark, o.create_time, o.update_time, org.org_name, d.name as deceased_name from mem_order o left join mem_organization org on o.org_id = org.org_id left join mem_deceased d on o.deceased_id = d.deceased_id where o.order_no = #{orderNo}
select count(*) from mem_order where org_id = #{orgId}
select sum(amount) from mem_order where org_id = #{orgId} and status = 1
mapper.insert: insert into mem_order (order_no, org_id, deceased_id, customer_name, customer_phone, package_type, amount, status, pay_time, remark, create_time) values (#{orderNo}, #{orgId}, #{deceasedId}, #{customerName}, #{customerPhone}, #{packageType}, #{amount}, #{status}, #{payTime}, #{remark}, #{createTime})
mapper.delete:
delete from mem_order where order_id in
#{orderId}
